_note: Mailchimp Customer Journey reference file. Use the data below when building your automation in Mailchimp: Automations → Customer Journeys → Create Journey.

emails.preview_text: We hope your appointment went well and you're feeling good.
emails.body_plain_text:
Hi [PatientFirstName],

We hope your appointment went well and you're feeling good.

If you have 60 seconds, would you mind leaving us a review on Google? It helps other people in Toronto find a dentist they can actually trust — and it means a lot to our team.

→ [ReviewLink]

If anything about your visit wasn't quite right, please reply here instead. We'd rather hear it directly and have the chance to fix it.

Thank you either way.

The Christie Park Dental Team

emails.preview_text: We sent a note a few days ago about a Google review — completely understand if the timing wasn't right.
emails.body_plain_text:
Hi [PatientFirstName],

We sent a note a few days ago about a Google review — completely understand if the timing wasn't right.

If you have a minute, we'd still appreciate it: [ReviewLink]

Either way, we're glad you came in, and we look forward to seeing you at your next visit.

The Christie Park Dental Team
